commands: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && printf '{"service": {"timeout_seconds": 30}}\n' > "$tmpdir/baseline.json" && printf '{"service": {"timeout_seconds": 30}}\n' > "$tmpdir/candidate.json" && PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m config_drift_checker_template_pack check-drift --baseline "$tmpdir/baseline.json" --candidate "$tmpdir/candidate.json" --output json >/dev/null && rc=$?; rm -rf "$tmpdir"; exit $rc
